member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.API.Controllers.AuthorizationController.GetClaimsPrincipal(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a ClaimsPrincipal DTO for the specified user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.API.Controllers.UsersController.GetNormalizedEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the normalized email for the specified user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.API.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserRoles(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the roles assigned to the specified user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.API.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserProfile(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the profile details for the specified user.
